title: Ubiquiti UP-SuperLink- SuperLink gateway for UniFi Protect / SuperLink sensors
description: Proprietary super long-range, low-latency wireless gateway for UniFi Protect and StarLink Sensors. It supports BLE (Bluetooth® 5.2) and the proprietary SuperLink protocol. The gateway allows connection of up to 96 SuperLink clients (still in development) at a distance of up to 2 km and up to 7 UP-Sense (BLE) sensors The SuperLink Gateway can be powered by USB Type-C or PoE 802.3af . It can be mounted on a wall or a DIN rail Proprietary SuperLink protocol for long-range communication Supports up to 103 connected sensors in total Powered by USB Type-C or PoE SuperLink Gateway DIN rail mount bracket Wall mount bracket Drill template (2) Screws and wall plugs
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency Bluetooth, SuperLink Antenna gain [dBi] 3 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af Power type PoE, USB-C Max. power consumption [W] 3,4 Power via connector/terminal 5V / 1A Physical characteristics Design On the wall, DIN rail Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 179 Width [mm] 82 Height [mm] 159 Depth [mm] 26
